special_mechanics.name: Follower Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player-controlled followers (peeps) wander across isometric landscape and automatically build houses on flat land. Movement behavior is tied to terrain manipulation rather than direct player character control.

special_mechanics.name: Terrain Manipulation
special_mechanics.description: Core mechanic of raising/lowering land to create pathways and flat building zones for followers. Affects follower movement and settlement patterns.

special_mechanics.name: Water Physics
special_mechanics.description: Game includes water simulation affecting follower movement and divine powers like floods.

physics_values.note: Water displacement behavior documented in development anecdotes

tier_notes: Populous is a god-game/simulation where player controls divine powers and follower populations rather than a direct character. Traditional platformer movement physics (jump, gravity, acceleration) are not applicable to this game paradigm. No documented movement parameters available for Genesis version.
